title: Beetroot & Butter Irish Bowl Delight
description: A simple Irish-inspired dish that combines roasted beetroot with a crispy butter topping, served in a bowl.
instructions: Peel and chop the beetroot into cubes.
Toss the beetroot with a pinch of salt and black pepper on a baking sheet.
Roast in the oven for 25-30 minutes, or until tender.
While the beetroot is roasting, melt 2 tablespoons of buttery in a pan over low heat.
Once the beetroot is done, remove it from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Transfer the beetroot to the bowl.
Pour the melted butter over the beetroot.
